ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dishes" (
  "dish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dish */,
  "dish_name" TEXT /* Name of the dish */,
  "num_ingredients" INTEGER /* Number of ingredients in the dish */,
  "hearts_restored" REAL /* Number of hearts restored by the dish */,
  "fully_restores_all_hearts" INTEGER /* Whether the dish fully restores all hearts */,
  "temp_additional_hearts" REAL /* Temporary additional hearts provided by the dish */,
  "stamina_wheel_restoration" TEXT /* Restoration effect on the stamina wheel */,
  "effect" TEXT /* Effect of the dish on the character */,
  "effect_duration_minutes" REAL /* Duration of the dish's effect in minutes */,
  "effect_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the dish's effect */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the dish, including special requirements or recommendations */,
  "sell_price" INTEGER /* Sell price of the dish in-game */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dish was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the dish was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the dish is archived */,
  "recipe_difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the recipe */,
  "cooking_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Time required to cook the dish */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the dish */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value of the dish */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the dish */,
  "source" TEXT /* Origin of the dish */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ingredient */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the ingredient was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the ingredient was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the ingredient is archived */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the ingredient */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location where the ingredient can be found */,
  "calories" INTEGER /* Number of calories in the ingredient */,
  "nutritional_value" TEXT /* Nutritional value of the ingredient */,
  "difficulty_to_obtain" TEXT /* Difficulty level to obtain the ingredient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dish_ingredients" (
  "dish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dish */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the ingredient in the dish */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the relationship is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dish_id", "ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., game developer, analyst, data manager) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user is archived */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_dish_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "dish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dish */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the dish */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the access record was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the access record was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the access record is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "dish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dish_effectiveness" (
  "dish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dish */,
  "effectiveness" REAL /* Effectiveness of the dish (out of 10) */,
  "effectiveness_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the effectiveness of the dish */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the effectiveness record was added to the database */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the effectiveness record was last modified */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the effectiveness record is archived */,
  "effectiveness_rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dish's effectiveness has been rated */,
  "average_effectiveness_rating" REAL /* Average effectiveness rating of the dish */,
  "last_rated_date" TEXT /* Date the dish was last rated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dish_id")
)
